title: The Quant Historian: Quant Is Dying! This Is What’s Next
description:
Computer science students, new graduates, and software engineers...want to land your dream software engineering job/internship? Click here 👉 https://www.amanmanazir.com/coaching/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video_description&utm_campaign=Annanay_Quant&video=Yasib76zRjE

He went from Cambridge math olympiad → Citadel quant → YC-backed founder. And he's saying out loud what nobody in finance will.

Annanay breaks down the hidden world of high frequency trading, why the quant golden era is over, what's actually replacing it, and the unconventional moves ambitious 20-somethings should be making right now.

This one will change how you think about your career.

🚀 Get my free Software Engineering Crash Course – https://www.amanmanazir.com/7dayengineer

🎧 Listen to all episodes of the Software Engineering Accelerator Podcast on Apple Podcasts and Spotify:
https://podcasts.apple.com/za/podcast/swe-accelerator-podcast/id1742843726?i=1000755421454
https://open.spotify.com/episode/7JAeeIhiSd928tbK15Xb6g?si=ed592e3f65964e29

Listen to our new podcast, @TheEntropyShow: https://youtu.be/MDJQXbXPngg?si=vQqITmNzy3fhfcV1

I’m Aman Manazir, a career coach and software engineer. I interned at companies like Amazon, Shopify, and HP in college, and the day I graduated I landed a $168,000/year* full-time software engineering job. I help you make it as a computer science student & software engineer and get your dream job offer.
